title: VimFu — z. z+ z- z^ Scroll Variants
description: z. is like zz but puts cursor on first non-blank. z+ and z- scroll to the next/previous page's first line. z^ scrolls to the previous page's last line.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.caption: z. z+ z- z^ — Scroll Variants

steps.say: Beyond Z Z, Z T, and Z B, there are more scroll variants. Z dot, Z plus, Z minus, and Z caret.
Z dot is like Z Z but moves the cursor to the first non blank character.
Centered, and cursor moved to the first non blank. Z Z would keep the cursor at the end.
Z plus shows the first line of the next page at the top.
Scrolled down a page. Cursor on the first non blank of the top line.
Z caret does the opposite. Previous page, last line.
Z dot centers with cursor on first non blank. Z plus and Z caret page forward and back. Niche, but good to know.
